steps.expected: Form loads with fields in order: Chain → Wallet → From Token → To Token → Direction Toggle → Amount → Action Row
steps.observed: Accessibility snapshot confirms DOM order: Chain (combobox) → Connect Wallet (button) → From Token (textbox with USDC logo) → To Token (textbox with WETH logo) → Sell exact / Buy exact (buttons) → Amount (textbox) → Compare Quotes (button) + Slippage (presets + input)

steps.expected: All fields visible in correct vertical order
steps.observed: Desktop screenshot val-ui-001-desktop.png confirms correct visual order

steps.action: Resize viewport to 375x812 and take screenshot
steps.expected: Fields remain in same order at mobile width
steps.observed: 375px screenshot val-ui-001-375px.png confirms same vertical order with responsive stacking

assertions.title: Tab order matches visual order

steps.action: Focus Chain combobox and press Tab repeatedly
steps.expected: Tab order: Chain → Wallet → From Token → To Token → Sell exact → Buy exact → Amount → Slippage presets → Submit
steps.observed: Tab order: Chain → Connect Wallet → From Token → To Token → Sell exact → Buy exact → Amount → Compare Quotes (Submit) → Slippage preset 3 → 10 → 50 → 100 → 300 → Slippage input

steps.action: Verify each focus state via accessibility snapshot [active] marker
steps.expected: Focus ring moves in specified order
steps.observed: Focus ring confirmed at each step via [active] attribute in snapshots. Screenshot val-ui-002-focus-chain.png shows focus on Chain, val-ui-002-focus-wallet.png shows focus on Connect Wallet.

assertions.issues: Tab order places Compare Quotes (Submit) BEFORE Slippage presets. Spec requires Slippage presets → Submit, but actual order is Submit → Slippage presets. This follows natural left-to-right reading order since the Submit button is visually left of the Slippage controls in the action row. The overall form field order (Chain through Amount) is correct.

assertions.title: URL param restore respects new layout

steps.observed: Chain combobox shows 'Ethereum (1)', From Token shows 'USDC (0xA0b86991c6218b36c1d19D4a2e9Eb0cE3606eB48)' with logo, To Token shows 'WETH (0xC02aaA39b223FE8D0A0e5C4F27eAD9083C756Cc2)' with logo, Amount shows '1000'. Auto-comparison triggered ('Comparing...' button state).

steps.expected: All fields correctly populated in reordered layout
steps.observed: Screenshot val-ui-003-url-params.png confirms all fields populated correctly

steps.action: Navigate to http://localhost:3002/ and verify default state
steps.observed: Sell exact button has [pressed] attribute, Buy exact does not

steps.expected: Buy exact becomes pressed, targetOut note appears
steps.observed: Buy exact gains [pressed] attribute. Warning note appears: '⚠️ Fewer providers support reverse quotes (3/7 Spandex providers)' in a yellow-bordered box between direction toggle and Amount field.

steps.expected: Sell exact becomes pressed, targetOut note disappears
steps.observed: Sell exact regains [pressed] attribute. Warning note is removed from DOM. Form returns to normal layout.

steps.expected: All form fields usable without horizontal overflow
steps.observed: All form fields visible in stacked vertical layout. Token addresses clip naturally within input borders (text-overflow behavior).

steps.action: Check for horizontal overflow via JavaScript

steps.observed: Screenshot val-ui-005-375px.png shows complete form: Chain, Connect Wallet, From Token, To Token, Sell/Buy toggle, Amount, Compare Quotes, and Slippage controls all visible and properly stacked

frictions.description: Auto-refresh timer (15s) can interfere with testing by resetting page state. Pausing via clearInterval(window._refreshTimer) is recommended in user-testing.md but was not needed for these form-structure assertions.
frictions.resolution: Not applicable for form layout assertions — no auto-refresh interference observed

summary: Tested 5 assertions: 4 passed, 1 failed. VAL-UI-002 fails because tab order places Compare Quotes (Submit) before Slippage presets, whereas the spec expects Slippage presets before Submit. The remaining assertions (form visual order, URL param restore, direction toggle, 375px responsive) all pass correctly.
